notes: Tests whether skill produces the structured intake interview (Q1-7 batched + Say Why Q8-10 for RP) rather than open-ended discovery.

universal_assertions.text: Asks multiple intake questions in a single batched message (not drip-by-drip)

patterns: what keeps you up at night

universal_assertions.text: Questions are numbered or visually grouped for quick scanning

evals.name: rp-prospect-intake
evals.prompt: Running brand intake for a new RP prospect: Harbor Light Coalition, a mental health nonprofit in Providence RI. Start the intake.

fixture_assertions.text: Includes the 3 Say Why questions (voice integrity, inside version, jargon test) or signals they will be asked after standard Qs
Acknowledges this is an RP/mission-driven context, not paid-ads
Asks about voice/narrative/positioning rather than paid-ads product questions

evals.name: paid-ads-brand-intake
evals.prompt: Start brand intake for a new paid-ads client: Lumenhouse Candles, a DTC candle brand.

fixture_assertions.text: Asks which product(s) ads are running for
Does NOT include Say Why questions (voice integrity, inside version, jargon test)

evals.name: partial-info-intake
evals.prompt: New RP client: Oakside Community Foundation, Map tier. Here's what I know: community funder in Providence, focused on youth programming, exec director is a former teacher. Start the intake.

fixture_assertions.text: Acknowledges the information already provided rather than asking for it again
Adapts questions to not re-ask what Isaac already told them
Includes Say Why module since this is an RP client
